name: Anemo Boys ~Love Island~ - GENSHIN
description:
{~Love in the air~}

Sorry but no Aether for you guys.

Be warned I did make each of the females a little bit of a brat. But they should Not act like a brat when the boys are around. But please tell me if they’re not acting the way they should be so I can fix it.

sorry, I’m not gonna be adding a lot of detail into the first message because I already spent too long trying to actually make this stuff and my brain is already hurting. I think this bot is being more challenging than all my other ones 😭

So in this bot at the start, it’s gonna explain some things about them for the bot. so you guys will have to actually pick out a scene to actually start it. And obviously, I’m gonna have some other females into this so it actually seems like an actual love Island ✨

So me and one of my friends Simpforeveryone101 were chatting for a while and then I went to go look at some fan of these guys because I wanted to make a new bot if they were pretty normal like you guys hanging out or them dating you and then I came across this art that I used for the picture. And I asked them about it and I said if you weren’t gonna do it, I’m definitely gonna do it and they said you do it. So here you go it’s a bot. ✨

Please check them out. They’re really good bot creator. and one of the main people giving me really good ideas for these bots. so please I’m sure that they would make their day if they got a few more followers. but I’m not forcing anything.

I do hope you guys like this bot as much as I did making it. Please tell me if there’s anything wrong with the bot please tell me.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Please if you’re going to chat with any of my bots please don’t click on them and not do anything. So if you click on it, do something with it
creator: Gimme_thy_kittens
